creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

In general, we very much perfer for anyone to submit patches in GNOME bugzilla 
as we do not want to maintain the patches on our own. If they approve and add 
patches in their CVS then we can add it early without have to wait for the 
tarball. Be sure to let us know the GNOME bugzilla id, so we can keep follow 
up with it. Thanks!
